##DESCRIPTION=Subhedral to anhedral, granular and platy transparent, colourless, or pale yellow crystals  in interstices or enclosed in microcline, aegirine and nepheline. Type sample described in Wu et al (2023)
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
